notes: Compressed proxy for a real long session: 4 plain prompts. Spec asserts per-turn ready→working→ready arcs with no flicker WITHIN a turn, session never sticks in a single state. Tool-call variants were originally part of the recipe but the modern claudecode default (Sonnet 4.6 + high effort) refuses auto-mode for paid models, which stalls tool-call turns at the permission gate; plain prompts keep the recording deterministic without a settings-hook detour. The no-flicker-within-turn invariant is still meaningful because each turn has multiple intermediate assistant chunks. Final state is ready.

text: Final turn ends; working → ready. Session reaches ready (spec bullet 4).
